zh.lifeSummary: 當Godeheut de Sable於大約1130年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特拉 福利艾時，她的父親Bernard De Sablé41歲，母親Anthoinette De Dol32歲。她和Hughes III de SILLE LE GUILLAUME至少有1個兒子。她去世於1165年在法國薩特希利艾勒-吉耀奧享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a sandy place, from sable ‘sand’.
French (Sablé): habitational name from a place so called in Sarthe.

variants.name: Zabel
meanings: German: from Middle High German zabel ‘board game’ (from Latin tabula), hence a nickname for a habitual game player.

en.lifeSummary: When Godeheut de Sable was born about 1130, in La Flèche, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Bernard De Sablé, was 41 and her mother, Anthoinette De Dol, was 32. She had at least 1 son with Hughes III de SILLE LE GUILLAUME. She died in 1165, in Sillé-le-Guillaume, Sarthe, France, at the age of 36.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Hughes III de SILLE LE GUILLAUME. Elle est décédée en 1165, à Sillé-le-Guillaume, Sarthe, France, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ko.Sillé-le-Guillaume, 72334, Sarthe, Pays: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 시e-레-길로

ko.lifeSummary: Godeheut de Sable(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 라 플e체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard De Sablé(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anthoinette De Dol(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Hughes III de SILLE LE GUILLAUME(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 프랑스 사르테 시e-레-길로에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godeheut de Sable родилась около 1130 г. в местности ла флeч, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard De Sablé было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Anthoinette De Dol, 32. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Hughes III de SILLE LE GUILLAUME. Она умерла в 1165 г. в местности силлe-ле-гуиллаюм, сарт, Франция в возрасте 36 лет.
